Javascript.isMandatory: var amt = Services.getValue(InstalmentAmount.dataBinding); return ( null != amt && amt.length > 0);

Context.HintText: Enter the instalment period - list available
Enter the instalment period - list available

Context.isEnabled: var payDate = Services.getValue(PaymentDate.dataBinding); return('Y' != Services.getValue(JudgmentForthwith.dataBinding) && ( null == payDate || "" == payDate ));
